mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS schedule_id, s.employee_id AS doctor_id, e.realname AS doctor_name, s.deptment_id AS dept_id, d.dept_name, s.schedule_date, s.noon, s.regist_quota, s.schedule_status, s.source_type FROM scheduling s LEFT JOIN employee e ON s.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.deptment_id = d.id WHERE 1=1 AND s.deptment_id = #{deptId} AND s.employee_id = #{doctorId} AND s.schedule_date >= #{startDate} AND s.schedule_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY s.schedule_date, s.noon, e.realname
